Episodes.Title: Attack Over Baghdad
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Carlo Essagian, Steve Boyle
Episodes.Plot: An Airbus A300 flying for DHL is struck by a ground-to-air missile on the left wing tip, shortly after take-off from Baghdad. With damage that included loss of all hydraulics, the aircraft crew struggles to land safely.

Episodes.Title: Out of Control
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Denis Akiyama, Ho Chow
Episodes.Plot: Japan Airlines flight 123 veers out of control and crashes in the mountains, becoming the worst air disaster involving a single aircraft in 1985.

Episodes.Title: Suicide Attack
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Jonathan Whittaker, Kerry Dorey
Episodes.Plot: Three Fedex crew members must fight off a cockpit attack from another employee in mid-flight.

Episodes.Title: Bomb on Board
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Sam Kalilieh, Moody El-Karaouni
Episodes.Plot: A bomb exploded on Philippine Airlines flight 434, killing one passenger and disabling several vital systems on board in 1994.

Episodes.Title: Mistaken Identity
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Craig Eldridge, Chris Owens
Episodes.Plot: US Navy cruiser spots an airplane approaching them on a radar. Numerous attempts to contact the aircraft go unanswered. Is it a friend or a foe? The Navy commander must make a decision whether or not to shoot down the approaching ...

Episodes.Title: Hanging by a Thread
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Robin Schisler, Greg Ellwand
Episodes.Plot: The roof tears off of Aloha Airlines 243, a Boeing 737, at 24,000 feet.

Episodes.Title: Death and Denial
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Elias Zarou, Gerry Mendicino
Episodes.Plot: Was it a mechanical failure or a suicidal pilot that doomed Egypt Air Flight 990? Years later, the dispute continues.

Episodes.Title: Ocean Landing
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Horace Abel, Dorothy A. Atabong
Episodes.Plot: Ethiopian Airlines Flight 961: the pilot is forced to ditch his plane into the ocean after being hijacked and running out of fuel.

Episodes.Title: Kid in the Cockpit
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Genadijs Dolganovs, Philipp Leibovski
Episodes.Plot: Enter the cockpit of RIA Flight 593, where pilots battle an uncooperative plane, gravity, and a teen at the wheel.
